meta.name: BAS-2 Body Appreciation Scale
meta.description: The BAS-2 is a 10-item scale assessing positive body image, measuring acceptance, respect, and protection of one's body. Unlike measures focused solely on dissatisfaction, it captures positive body image across diverse genders and cultural backgrounds.
meta.author: Tylka & Wood-Barcalow (2015)
meta.reference: Tylka TL, Wood-Barcalow NL. The Body Appreciation Scale-2: item refinement and psychometric evaluation. Body Image. 2015;12:53-67.
meta.instruction: Please indicate how often the following statements are true for you.

questions.text: I feel good about my body
On the whole, I am satisfied with my body
Despite its imperfections, I still like my body
I feel that my body has at least some good qualities
I take a positive attitude towards my body
I appreciate the different and unique characteristics of my body
I feel comfortable in my body
I am attentive to my body's needs
I feel like I am beautiful even if I am different from media images of attractive people

ranges.label: Low Body Appreciation
ranges.description: Your body appreciation and acceptance is low. You may have a negative body image. Your mental health concerns are notable and may be impacting daily functioning. Speaking with a mental health professional is recommended.
suggestions: Focus on your body's functionality rather than appearance
Practice self-compassion and body gratitude
Reduce exposure to appearance-related social media content
If body image concerns significantly affect your life, consider seeking professional help
Schedule a mental health professional assessment as soon as possible

ranges.label: Below Average Body Appreciation
ranges.description: Your body appreciation is below average. You may be dissatisfied with some aspects of your body. At this level, psychological concerns may be affecting your daily life. It is recommended to take active steps and consider available support options.
suggestions: Try writing down one positive thing about your body each day
Choose activities and clothing that make your body feel comfortable
Reduce comparisons with others' appearances
Cultivate gratitude for your body's functions
Consider consulting a mental health professional

ranges.label: Moderate Body Appreciation
ranges.description: You have a moderate level of body appreciation and acceptance, with a generally positive attitude. Mild psychological concerns are common in life. Focusing on self-care and healthy coping strategies can help maintain well-being.
suggestions: Continue cultivating a positive attitude toward your body
Maintain regular physical activity and enjoy the pleasure of movement
Practice intuitive eating and listen to your body's needs
Focus on self-care with good routines and regular exercise
Learn simple relaxation and stress-relief techniques

ranges.label: High Body Appreciation
ranges.description: You have a high level of body appreciation and acceptance, with a positive body image. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining your positive attitude toward your body
Your body appreciation can serve as a positive example for others
Continue caring for and respecting your body's needs
Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
